content.query:
CREATE VIEW Prd_ItemMaster
-- drop view Prd_ItemMaster
AS

SELECT      [Item Number], [Item Name], [Main ERP]
,           B.[Brand Short Name], [Master Data Brand], [Master Data Finance Brand], [Master Data Division]
FROM        v_MainERP_Item A
LEFT JOIN   v_Brand_Item B on A.[Brand Short Name] = B.[Brand Short Name]
